zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenlian Verch Phillip於大約1355年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾聖 皮埃爾時，她的父親Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr28歲，母親Nest verch Gwilym Sais26歲。她和Dafydd Ap Gwilym至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1417年在威爾士格拉莫爾根亞斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenlian Verch Phillip于大约1355年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾聖 皮埃爾时，她的父亲Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr28岁，母亲Nest verch Gwilym Sais26岁。她和Dafydd Ap Gwilym至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1417年在威尔士格拉莫爾根亞斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Esme, Gaston, Monique.
English (mainly Yorkshire), Scottish, and German: variant of   Philip  .
Americanized form of French   Philippe  , Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian   Filip  . Compare   Philip  .

variants.name: McPhillips
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Fitzgerald.
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Philib, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of the personal name Phillip , with excrescent English -s. See also McKillip .

variants.name: Piela
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Casimir, Janina, Jerzy, Tadeuz.
from a local vernacular derivative of the personal nameFilip (see Phillip ).

variants.name: Philip
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Varughese, Mathai, Babu, Reji, Anil, Binu, Neena, Prema, Raju, Reena, Susheela, Aleykutty.

Scottish, English, German, Dutch, and Jewish: from the Greek personal name Philippos (from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’). In the New Testament this name is borne by one of the apostles; it was also borne by various other early Christian saints. It owes part of its popularity to the medieval romances about Alexander the Great, whose father was Philip of Macedon. As a Jewish name, it represents a borrowing of the personal name from Christians. As a Highland Scottish surname, it represents an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Spanish Felipe , Catalan Felip, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian Filip , Albanian Filipi , and their derivatives (see examples at Philips ). The name Philip is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Philipose and Pothen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Phillip .
French (southern) and Breton (Finistère): variant of   Philippe  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenlian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenlian Verch Phillip was born about 1355, in St Pierre, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr, was 28 and her mother, Nest verch Gwilym Sais, was 26. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Dafydd Ap Gwilym. She died in 1417, in Neath, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenlian Verch Phillip est née environ 1355, à St Pierre, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Gwilym Sais, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Dafydd Ap Gwilym. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Neath, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenlian Verch Phillip um 1355 in St Pierre, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr 28 und ihre Mutter Nest verch Gwilym Sais 26. Sie hatte mit Dafydd Ap Gwilym mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Neath, Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenlian Verch Phillip è nata il circa 1355 nel St Pierre, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Nest verch Gwilym Sais, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Dafydd Ap Gwilym. Morì nel 1417, nel Neath, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenlian Verch Phillipが約1355年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアスト ピエアで生まれた時，父Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyrは28歳，母Nest verch Gwilym Saisは26歳であった。彼女はDafydd Ap Gwilymとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1417年にウェールズグラモーガンネアスで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenlian Verch Phillip(이)가 대략 1355년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스트 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest verch Gwilym Sais(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Dafydd Ap Gwilym(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 웨일스 글램르건 니앳h에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenlian Verch Phillip родилась около 1355 г. в местности ст пьирр, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Philip ap Llywelyn of Sain Pyr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Gwilym Sais, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Dafydd Ap Gwilym. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности нит, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 63 лет.
